differential_diagnoses: Primary angiitis of the central nervous system
next_steps: Brain and leptomeningeal biopsy of the affected cortical regions
Whole-body PET-CT or dermatological evaluation to search for occult primary melanoma
Immunohistochemical staining of biopsy tissue (MITF, Melan-A, HMB-45)
MRI brain with contrast and high-resolution vessel wall imaging
Repeat CSF analysis for cytology, protein, and autoimmune markers
